subject: Databases
title: WHERE Filters Rows
description: Learn WHERE Filters Rows in one minute.

hook.text: A table has a million users. You want the ones from Canada. WHERE country = 'CA' does the job.

buildup.text: WHERE adds conditions. Only rows that match the condition appear in the result.

discovery.text: Use operators: =, !=, >, <, BETWEEN, IN, LIKE. Combine with AND/OR for complex filters.

twist.text: WHERE name LIKE '%smith%' searches for any name containing smith. But LIKE can be slow without an index.

climax.text: Indexed columns in WHERE clauses run fast. Non-indexed ones cause full table scans.

punchline.text: WHERE picks the rows you need. Index the columns it uses.

quiz.question: What happens when you use WHERE on a non-indexed column?
options: The database scans every row in the table to find matches
The query fails with an error
The database automatically creates an index
